Keep the deep frozen In both the above cases, check whether the pizza has softened completely by piercing with a knife or a clean toothpick which go Once thawed bake immediately, do not re-freeze. Do not microwave. A. Electric Oven 1. Preheat the oven to 250°C. 2. Place the pizza in the oven and cook for 8-10 minutes, until the crust becomes golden brown. C. Tava (Frying Pan) 1.
